texto: The lesson of the Funk Dog: “You can forget what it used to feel like to feel good about life
autor: feeling rotten—or just a low-grad funk—seems normal and therefore acceptable. I just don’t believe that God intended for any of his creatures to be petted with sticks.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a feeling rotten—or just a low-grad funk—seems normal and therefore acceptable. I just don’t believe that God intended for any of his creatures to be petted with sticks.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “The lesson of the Funk Dog: “You can forget what it used to feel like to feel good about life” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, jill-conner-browne, the-sweet-potato-queens-book-of-love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-sweet-potato-queens-book-of-love.
